input.background: For the illustrative data, we have established \(\bar{x}=603.64, \bar{y}=20.55, s_X=378.451, s_Y=11.725\) and \(r=0.737\).
input.question: Calculate the intercept coefficient \(a\) using the slope \(b\) and means \(\bar{x}\) and \(\bar{y}\).

mean_x.description: The mean value of variable x.

mean_y.description: The mean value of variable y.

slope_b.description: The slope of the regression line, which is needed to calculate the intercept.

intercept_a.description: The intercept of the regression line to be calculated.
